nodes.label: Note On
nodes.description: Incoming MIDI note-on event triggers voice start value calculation

nodes.label: Mode Check
nodes.description: Checks if modulation mode is GainMode or another mode (Pitch/Pan/Global)

nodes.label: Return 0.0
nodes.description: In GainMode, returns 0.0 (intensity carries the actual value)

nodes.label: Return 1.0
nodes.description: In PitchMode and other modes, returns 1.0 (neutral multiplier)

nodes.label: Intensity
nodes.description: Inherited intensity parameter from Modulation base class. This is the primary control mechanism — set via script with setIntensity()

nodes.label: Modulation Output
nodes.description: Final modulation value after intensity is applied by the modulation chain framework
